summary: A top‑notch audience recording that captures an insanely excited crowd, highlighted by the debut of new “Speedway Boogie” and a raucous R&C performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the show’s energy – the crowd went nuts for the fresh “Speedway Boogie” and the fiery R&C jam. The audience (AUD) tape is praised as the best of those posted, delivering clear, lively sound that lets listeners feel the excitement despite the unknown venue date.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for both performance energy and recording clarity; limited to two reviews, so confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls this AUD the best of all posted tapes – clear, lively sound with no noted issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: While the exact setlist isn’t detailed, reviewers emphasize a wildly enthusiastic crowd and strong moments around the new Speedway Boogie and R&C, suggesting an engaging flow.
